name: floating-clock
description: Always-on-top floating desktop clock for macOS — multi-file Objective-C NSPanel with three-segment dashboard (LOCAL · ACTIVE MARKETS · NEXT TO OPEN). 7 bundled profiles (Default / Day Trader / Night Owl / Minimalist / Researcher / Watch Party / Auction Watcher) + 17 Quick Style moods (Brutalist / Zen / Retro CRT / Executive / Neon / Hacker / Glacier / Midnight / Featherlight / Industrial / Trading Floor / Scholar / Samba / Borealis / Cinema / Levitation / Studio). 14 major exchanges (NYSE · TSX · B3 · LSE · Euronext · XETRA · SIX · JSE · TSE · HKEX · SSE · KRX · NSE · ASX) covering all populated continents, grouped by region (Americas / Europe / Africa / Asia / Oceania) via iana-prefix detection. Live 5-state session tracking (OPEN · LUNCH · PRE-MARKET · AFTER-HOURS · CLOSED) — amber ◐ dawn + rose ◒ dusk auction signals, gated by SessionSignalWindow (off / 5-60 min, Quick-Style-composable). Rocket-launch T-HH:MM:SS countdown (progressive to T-Nd Hh MMm SSs at ≥24h, every scale ticks seconds). Imminence-aware countdown gradient via Weber-Fechner log scale + HSB hue rotation 120°→0° + 1Hz pulse — UrgencyHorizon (5/15/30/60/120/240 min) and UrgencyFlash (off/subtle/normal/intense) levers, both Quick-Style-composable. Tabulated sections with frosted-glass. Clipboard snapshots with self-documenting UTC-stamped headers. /floating-clock:diagnose slash command + Reveal App in Finder + Copy Time/Active/Next menu utilities. **v1.15 headline: weekly progress bar on LOCAL + 4 lever bracket-expansions + Concrete theme + Studio Quick Style**. New WeekProgressBar feature (iter-229..234): pure-offline week indicator on the LOCAL segment in its own block below the timestamp. 7 day-groups separated by `┊` (light dotted vertical line) for visible weekly rhythm. Auto-fits the segment width — `WeekProgressCellsPerDay=0` triggers Runtime.m to compute cells per day from the segment's actual width × mono char-width (~19 cells/day at typical width = 140-char bar). Weekend (Sat/Sun) cells dim to 0.45 alpha so trading-week and weekend are immediately distinguishable. Day-of-week letters (M T W T F S S) labeled above each day-group; ISO 8601 week-of-year (financial-market convention — Reuters/Bloomberg/SWIFT/Basel) shown as W## in the top-left corner. LOCAL becomes a 4-row layout: timestamp / day-letters / week-bar / dedicated debug-label strip, plus the W## badge anchored top-left. Aesthetic surface expanded: 30 color themes (+1 Concrete — chromaless cool gray on charcoal architectural mood, 30th-theme milestone), 17 Quick Styles (+1 Studio — Concrete + sharp + subtle + medium — calm architectural readout), 16 progress-bar glyphs (+2 pies/boxes), 10 corner styles (+2 cushion/chunky), 9 shadow presets (unchanged from v1.14), 9 segment-gap presets (+2 cozy/open), 8 density profiles (+2 tight/roomy), 11 DateFormat presets (+2 weekday_only/monthday). 88 test fixtures total. Sub-0.1% idle CPU, ~224 KB signed binary.
